breakdown: This PR hardens validation for ZFC level-up schema by changing empty done payload handling from returning empty success to raising RuntimeError, along with refactoring mock attribute names (llm_request→gemini_request) and improving test monkeypatch patterns. Tests verify debug_info precedence and AST structure, but error handling lacks typed exceptions and documentation is minimal across changed functions.
key_changes: Change empty done payload test from expecting success to raising RuntimeError with specific message
Rename mock attribute llm_request→gemini_request in test mocks
Replace string-path monkeypatch with harness object binding
Add AST structure verification test for narrative fallback guard placement
